hooks.command: if [ -f ARTICLE_LOG.md ] && ! git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q ARTICLE_LOG.md; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "ARTICLE_LOG.md has not been updated this session. Append a dated entry with: what happened, key finding/decision, 1-2 sentences of article-ready prose, and any visualization paths. Then you may stop."}'; fi
